kiosk.Title: Miguel's Pizza
kiosk.Summary: Miguel’s Pizza is a beloved Red River Gorge landmark known for its handmade pizzas, vibrant climber community, and laid‑back atmosphere, serving as a central gathering spot for visitors exploring Natural Bridge and the surrounding Gorge.

kiosk.Title: Red River Rockhouse
kiosk.Summary: A popular farm‑to‑table restaurant in the Red River Gorge, known for its fresh, locally sourced menu, craft‑focused atmosphere, and welcoming vibe, offering burgers, tacos, and vegetarian options just minutes from Natural Bridge and Slade.

kiosk.Title: Hungry Hiker
kiosk.Summary: A casual, traveler‑friendly stop in the Red River Gorge area, offering quick meals, snacks, and refreshments for visitors heading to nearby trails, campgrounds, and scenic overlooks.

kiosk.Title: Ice Cream Shop
kiosk.Summary: The Ice Cream Shop at the Red River Gorge General Store offers a classic, family‑friendly treat stop, serving hand‑scooped ice cream, shakes, and cold desserts right beside one of the Gorge’s most convenient supply hubs, making it a sweet break for hikers, campers, and travelers passing through.

kiosk.Title: Thatcher Barbecue Company
kiosk.Summary: A local favorite in the Red River Gorge area, serving slow‑smoked meats, hearty sides, and classic Southern barbecue in a relaxed, welcoming setting that draws both travelers and regulars from across the region.

kiosk.Title: Sandstone Arches Restaurant
kiosk.Summary: The signature dining venue at Natural Bridge State Resort Park, offering classic Kentucky comfort dishes, scenic views of the surrounding ridges, and a relaxed lodge atmosphere that complements a day of exploring the RRG.

kiosk.Title: Trail’s End Tavern
kiosk.Summary: A cozy lodge‑style bar and grill at Natural Bridge State Resort Park, offering hearty pub fare, cold drinks, and a relaxed atmosphere that gives hikers and travelers a comfortable place to unwind after a day in the Gorge.

kiosk.Title: La Cabaña
kiosk.Summary: La Cabaña is a long‑standing Mexican restaurant near the Red River Gorge, offering hearty plates, familiar favorites, and a casual, welcoming atmosphere that makes it a popular stop for families, hikers, and travelers passing through the Slade and Stanton area.

kiosk.Title: Bruen's Restaurant
kiosk.Summary: A long‑running Stanton favorite, serving classic homestyle meals in a simple, welcoming setting that makes it a reliable stop for locals and travelers exploring the Red River Gorge area.

kiosk.Title: China Wok
kiosk.Summary: A quick, reliable Chinese takeout spot in Stanton, offering familiar favorites, fast service, and generous portions for travelers and locals passing through the Red River Gorge area.
kiosk.Address: 118 W College Ave Ste A, Stanton, KY 40380

kiosk.Title: Mi Finca
kiosk.Summary: A popular Mexican restaurant in Stanton, offering flavorful plates, friendly service, and a relaxed, family‑style atmosphere that makes it a reliable stop for visitors exploring the Red River Gorge area.

kiosk.Title: Mr. Ed’s Hotdogs
kiosk.Summary: A casual Stanton staple, serving classic grilled hot dogs, quick bites, and friendly small‑town service that makes it an easy stop for travelers heading to or from the Red River Gorge.

kiosk.Title: The Drive In Diner
kiosk.Summary: A former small‑town drive-in theater in Stanton turned diner, now serving burgers, shakes, and comfort‑food favorites in a nostalgic, laid‑back setting.

kiosk.Title: Knox Family Pizza
kiosk.Summary: A local Stanton favorite, serving fresh, family‑style pizzas, subs, and comfort‑food classics in a laid‑back, welcoming setting just a short drive from the Red River Gorge.

kiosk.Title: Mi Hacienda Mexican Grill
kiosk.Summary: A popular Stanton spot serving hearty Mexican dishes, fast service, and a friendly, family‑style atmosphere—making it a reliable stop for visitors heading to or from the Red River Gorge.

kiosk.Title: My Little Finca
kiosk.Address: 20 Black Creek Rd, Clay City, KY 40312

kiosk.Title: Drizzle and Glaze Donuts
kiosk.Summary: A sweet little Stanton stop known for fresh, soft donuts, creative flavors, and friendly hometown service—perfect for grabbing a treat on the way to the Red River Gorge.

kiosk.Title: Toad's BARn and Grill
kiosk.Summary: A lively, down‑home hangout in Stanton, serving hearty pub fare, cold drinks, and friendly small‑town hospitality that makes it a fun stop for locals and Red River Gorge travelers alike.

kiosk.Title: RedPoint Barbeque
kiosk.Summary: A laid‑back Slade favorite serving smoked meats, hearty sides, and a relaxed, trail‑friendly atmosphere—making it a convenient stop for hungry visitors exploring the Red River Gorge.
